title: LeapFrog Scout's Ring & Record Learning Phone, Interactive Learning Toy with Numbers, Alphabet, French and Mandarin Words, Musical Baby Toy for Ages 6, 12, 18 Months +, English Version
features: VOICE RECORDING FEATURE: Record and play back messages with Scout’s Ring & Record Learning Phone.
INTERACTIVE NUMBER BUTTONS: Introduces numbers 0-9, the alphabet, and greetings in French and Mandarin.
LEARNING SONGS: Fun songs teach phone routines, weather concepts, and colours, keeping baby engaged.
PRETEND PLAY: Press the phone button to hear Scout say hello and invite baby to play learning games.
SUPERSTAR SLIDER: Modulate recorded messages for added fun and interactive learning experiences.
description: From the manufacturer LeapFrog Scout's Ring & Record Learning Phone Scout’s Ring & Record Learning Phone is baby’s very own phone, with a voice-recording feature! Record a message Press the microphone button to record a message then use the superstar slider to modulate the recorded message! Bright and rainbow themed 10 number buttons introduce numbers 0-9, the alphabet and hello in French and Mandarin. Fun Learning Songs Fun learning songs introduce phone routines, weather concepts and colours. Baby can play pretend and practise babbling by pressing the phone button and hearing Scout say hello and invite baby to play learning games. Skills Colours Daily Routines Listening Skills Numbers & Counting French & Mandarin Words Suitable for ages 6+ Months ‎3 x AAA (included for demo purposes only). New batteries recommended for regular use.
